suppress.notes: False positive. CVE-2014-4199 and CVE-2014-4200 are VMware Tools (vm-support 0.88) vulnerabilities, CPE-mismatched to spring-boot-devtools. devtools is developmentOnly and is not present in the production runtime. file name: spring-boot-devtools-*.jar
False positive. See CVE-2014-4199 note above (same VMware Tools CPE mismatch on spring-boot-devtools, developmentOnly). file name: spring-boot-devtools-*.jar
